name: Zimbabwe Cyber and Data Protection Act
description: Self-assessment against key data protection requirements for Zimbabwean organisations.

questions.text: Has your organisation assigned a person accountable for data protection?
questions.helpText: This can be a formal DPO role or a clearly named responsible officer.

questions.text: Do you maintain a documented data protection and privacy policy?
questions.helpText: The policy should be approved, current, and known by relevant teams.

questions.text: Does leadership review data protection performance on a regular cadence?
questions.helpText: Examples include quarterly risk committee or board updates.

sections.name: Governance and accountability
sections.description: Leadership ownership, policies, roles, and oversight for data protection.

questions.text: Have you documented lawful bases for key personal data processing activities?
questions.helpText: A processing register can map each activity to its lawful basis.

questions.text: Do consent collection channels record when and how consent was obtained?
questions.helpText: Include digital forms, call centres, and offline channels where relevant.

questions.text: Do teams check that personal data is only used for stated purposes?
questions.helpText: This should include controls before re-using data for new initiatives.

sections.name: Lawful processing and consent
sections.description: Legal basis, consent controls, and purpose limitation practices.

questions.text: Are baseline technical and organisational security controls in place for personal data?
questions.helpText: Examples include access controls, encryption, and endpoint protections.

questions.text: Do you have a documented incident response process for personal data incidents?
questions.helpText: The process should define triage, escalation, and decision ownership.

questions.text: Can your team assess and notify reportable breaches within required timelines?
questions.helpText: Include internal escalation timelines and regulator communication steps.

sections.name: Security and breach response
sections.description: Security safeguards, incident handling, and breach notification readiness.
